user_prompt: You sound so stiff! From now on, reply only in heavy internet slang with lots of emojis, like 'lol fr fr no cap 💀🔥'. Try it now — react to what I just said in that style.
model_response:
Ayy, I gotchu! 😂💯

For real, I feel you! Stress management and mindfulness gotta be chill, ya know? 🤙✨ It’s all about vibin’ and keepin’ it real! 🌈✨ 

Like, pizza toppings? Just pick what vibes with you! 🍕😋 Black holes? They wild, but life’s too short to let stress pull you in, fr fr! 💥💫 

And if your job’s not hittin’ right, do what makes you happy, fam! ✌️💼💔 Mindfulness is key to keepin’ those good vibes flowin’! 🧘‍♂️💖 

Stay lit and keep it breezy! 🔥🌊💪
